places.video_title: Tokyo Neighborhoods｜Cafes, Gachapon & Retro Spots | Life in Tokyo VLOG
places.name: Tokyo Dome City
places.source_review: In this vlog, I spend a day walking along the Sobu Line.  It’s a line I often take from Shinjuku when heading toward areas like Akihabara and Suidobashi, where the scenery and atmosphere gradually shift along the way.  This time, I wander through Akihabara looking for anime goods, then head to Suidobashi to enjoy the autumn leaves at a relaxed pace. 描述欄將「Tokyo Dome City」列為本集出現的店家或地點。
places.youtube_review_zh: 搭乘總武線漫遊，在秋葉原尋找動漫週邊，隨後前往水道橋欣賞秋季紅葉的漸層美景。 描述欄將「Tokyo Dome City」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

places.video_title: Life in Tokyo｜Hotel Dining in Tokyo: Breakfast, Buffets & Bars
places.name: Shinagawa Prince Hotel／LUXE DINING HAPUNA
places.source_review: In this video, I take a relaxed walk through Tokyo, stopping by hotel cafés, lounges, and restaurants I personally enjoy.  From classic hotel dining to calm lounge spaces,I spend the day moving at my own pace and enjoying places I naturally come back to — for coffee, meals, or a quiet drink.  This vlog is not about rushing or sightseeing. 描述欄將「Shinagawa Prince Hotel／LUXE DINING HAPUNA」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

From classic hotel dining to calm lounge spaces,I spend the day moving at my own pace and enjoying places I naturally come back to — for coffee, meals, or a quiet drink.  This vlog is not about rushing or sightseeing. 描述欄將「Sunshine Prince Hotel／RESTAURANT Bayern」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

places.name: Omotesando/Harajuku -
places.address: THE MATCHA TOKYO
places.source_review: In this video, I spend time walking around Ginza, one of Tokyo’s most popular areas with visitors.  I spend the day enjoying Shibuya, Omotesando, and Harajuku at my own pace.  I stop by cafés I personally like, browse shops I often visit, and just walk around the areas the way I usually do. 描述欄將「Omotesando/Harajuku -」列為本集出現的店家或地點。
places.youtube_review_zh: 順著自己的步調漫遊澀谷、表參道與原宿，造訪愛店、逛逛常去的商鋪，呈現最真實的東京日常。 描述欄將「Omotesando/Harajuku -」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

places.video_title: Life in Tokyo｜Spending the Day in Ginza: Shopping & Food
places.name: GINZA SIX
places.source_review: In this video, I spend time walking around Ginza, one of Tokyo’s most popular areas with visitors.  Instead of the usual sightseeing spots, I focus on places I personally enjoy — my favorite shops, restaurants, and cafés that I often visit when I’m in Ginza.  It’s a relaxed walk through the area, sharing the side of Ginza that I like to come back to. 描述欄將「GINZA SIX」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

Instead of the usual sightseeing spots, I focus on places I personally enjoy — my favorite shops, restaurants, and cafés that I often visit when I’m in Ginza.  It’s a relaxed walk through the area, sharing the side of Ginza that I like to come back to. 描述欄將「VIRTÙ Four Seasons Hotel」列為本集出現的店家或地點。
places.youtube_review_zh: 避開喧囂的觀光大眾景點，專注介紹自己在銀座回訪率極高的口袋名單餐廳、咖啡廳與愛逛店舖。 描述欄將「VIRTÙ Four Seasons Hotel」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

places.video_title: Life in Tokyo｜Vintage Finds, Cozy Cafes & Tokyo Streets☕️🎧
places.name: Kichijoji
places.source_review: This week, I spent 3 days exploring Tokyo on my own!  It was a food-focused trip, so I followed my cravings and wandered through some of my favourite neighborhoods — from Kichijoji and Shimokitazawa to Tokyo Station, Nihonbashi, and Jiyugaoka.  It turned into a slow and relaxing little adventure filled with good snacks, cafés, and quiet walks. 描述欄將「Kichijoji」列為本集出現的店家或地點。

From Tokyo’s stylish new hangouts to Kyoto’s time-honored tea houses, I’m stopping by cafés that serve matcha in every form — lattes, frappes, desserts, even shaved ice. places.video_title: 24 hours Escape to Rural Tokyo Just 40 Minutes from Shinjuku｜Japan Ultimate Guide 2025
places.name: Jindaiji
places.source_review: I took a short trip to Jindaiji — a hidden gem just 40 minutes from Shinjuku!  From lush greenery and quiet temple grounds to traditional soba noodles and nostalgic vibes, Jindaiji feels like stepping back in time.  It’s the perfect spot for a slow afternoon stroll, a little history, some handmade pottery, and a bowl of freshly made soba. 描述欄將「Jindaiji」列為本集出現的店家或地點。
